statement: In every magma, Equation 595 (`x = y * (z * (w * (y * z)))`) implies Equation 264 (`x = ((x * y) * y) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0391
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op w (op y z))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op x y) y) y)
